stemHtml: Aircraft A and B approach each other on converging courses in VMC at approximately the same level in controlled airspace Class D. Given that aircraft A is flying under IFR and aircraft B is flying under VFR, which aircraft has the right of way?

options.a: Aircraft B providing it has aircraft A on its left.
options.b: Aircraft B regardless of the direction from which aircraft A is approaching.
options.c: Aircraft A regardless of the direction from which aircraft B is approaching.
options.d: Aircraft A providing it has aircraft B on its right.
